LanguageData.Ammo_RotaryShrapnelcannonShell.label: Shrapnelcannon shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_RotaryShrapnelcannonShell.descripti: Very large caliber buckshot shell designed specifically for the mech-operated Rotary Shrapnelcannon.
LanguageData.Bullet_RotaryShrapnelcannonShell.label: Shrapnelcannon buckshot pellet
